message:
test(storage): add history backup edge case tests

15 tests for history module storage-level behavior:
- Disabled config skips backup
- Non-existent target skips gracefully
- Changed content creates new backup (non-dedup)
- Identical content deduplicated to one backup
- Rotation by count keeps newest
- Rotation by age deletes old backups
- Mixed file stems rotate independently
- Prefix filter on list_backups
- Nonexistent dir returns empty list
- Invalid filenames skipped during listing
- Prune with zero keep deletes all
- Prune on empty dir is no-op
- BackupEntry fields populated correctly
- Backup preserves content byte-exactly
- Backups sorted newest first

Closes beads_rust-2xbh

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
